inlineContent.text: is the main entry point for compiling patterns and performing raw-byte searches.

Use the string initializer when your pattern starts as Swift text:
Use the byte initializer when the pattern already exists in a specific encoding:

code: let regex = try Regex(patternBytes: patternBytes, encoding: .gb18030)
